enchantment.addons.action_sound.kizuna_a: Equip on a helmet to hear cute sound effects for many actions!
enchantment.addons.action_sound.kotonoha: Equip on a helmet to hear cute sound effects for many actions!
Equip on a helmet to hear cute sound effects for many actions!
enchantment.addons.action_sound.yuzuki_y: Equip on a helmet to hear cute sound effects for many actions!
enchantment.addons.auto_repair.lore.0: Restores 5% of damaged durability every 3 ~ 1 seconds,
enchantment.addons.auto_repair.lore.2: only triggers while held or equipped.
enchantment.addons.bloodsucking.lore.0: Restores 4 ~ 10% of melee damage dealt as health.
enchantment.addons.break_recovery.lore.0: Instantly restores full durability when the item breaks,
enchantment.addons.break_recovery.lore.1: this enchantment will disappear after triggering.
enchantment.addons.buoyancy.lore.0: Reduces gravity by 30 ~ 60% when equipped on Elytra.
Axe has an 8 ~ 20% chance to deal 200% damage,
cannot trigger while under the Weakness effect.
enchantment.addons.delicacy.lore.0: Increases hunger restored by food by 20 ~ 30% when equipped on a helmet,
enchantment.addons.delicacy.lore.1: cannot trigger while under the Hunger effect.
enchantment.addons.eternal.lore.0: Dropped items will not naturally despawn,
enchantment.addons.eternal.lore.1: and will not be affected by most damage sources.
enchantment.addons.extension.lore.0: Increases the block interaction range of tools by 1 ~ 2 blocks.
enchantment.addons.frozen.lore.0: Freezes the target after a melee weapon attack,
enchantment.addons.gale.lore.0: Extends firework boost duration by 20 ~ 40% while flying with Elytra.
enchantment.addons.giganticize.lore.1: full set increases size by 60 ~ 120% total.
enchantment.addons.gravity.lore.0: Increases gravity by 40 ~ 100% when equipped on a chestplate.
enchantment.addons.infinite_durability.l: Durability is never consumed under any circumstances.
Reduces knockback received by 4 ~ 8% while wearing,
full set reduces knockback received by 16 ~ 32% total.
enchantment.addons.light_speed.lore.0: When equipped on boots and in a space with light level 10 or above,
enchantment.addons.miniaturize.lore.1: full set reduces size by 40% total.
enchantment.addons.nimble.lore.0: Increases safe fall height by 10 ~ 30 blocks when equipped on Elytra.
enchantment.addons.ore_refining.lore.0: Ores dropped after mining with a pickaxe are immediately smelted into ingots.
enchantment.addons.overclocking.lore.0: Increases block breaking speed of tools by 20 ~ 100%.
Reduces damage received by 3% while wearing,
but deducts experience proportional to the damage,
cannot trigger if not enough experience to offset the damage,
full set reduces damage received by 12% total.
enchantment.addons.spear.lore.0: Increases the entity interaction range of an axe by 1 ~ 3 blocks,
enchantment.addons.spear.lore.1: cannot trigger while under the Weakness effect.
enchantment.addons.steady_sneak.lore.0: Reduces damage received by 10 ~ 20% while sneaking with leggings equipped,
enchantment.addons.steady_sneak.lore.1: reduces movement speed by 60% while the effect is active,
enchantment.addons.steady_sneak.lore.2: cannot trigger while under the Weakness effect.
enchantment.addons.stubborn.lore.0: Increases attack damage by 2 ~ 5 when health drops below 6 with a chestplate equipped.
enchantment.addons.wind_blast.lore.0: 20 ~ 100% chance to generate a windstorm when a shield successfully blocks an attack.
enchantment.addons.wisdom.lore.0: Increases experience dropped by mobs killed with a melee weapon by 10 ~ 50%,
enchantment.addons.wisdom.lore.1: Bosses are not affected by this effect.

plugins.player_database.teleporting_know: Duplication bugs (TNT, leads) cannot be used!
The official community provides a super comprehensive new player guide!
If someone in the team is in a vault, instances cannot be opened.
In Magic Tower, only floors 3 and 5 are guaranteed to have an evacuation point!
If you have questions, you can ask in global chat, but don't spam!
You can set territory permissions in groups using numbers 1 ~ 9!
Reach-mining, hitbox-cheating, and ore X-ray are all cheating!
Remember to check your quests to see what to do today~
If harassed, you can submit an anonymous report to @Admin.
Some of these tips you see now were suggested by players!
Sending spam to people you don't know is not on, mate!
Adding people as friends you've never met will make you seem dodgy.
Territory regenerates 1 second of stamina every 5 seconds.
The server link in the ESC menu has the seed code!
When playing Magic Tower with teammates, don't log out! It will get the whole team stuck!
After playing for a long time, give your eyes a rest too!
Points above 3500 will not be carried over to the next season!
Too many ads? Try out the ad-block feature!
Regular sign-in for 45 days earns you 330 Cat Coins!
Remember to name important mobs, otherwise they'll despawn!
Once a territory is deleted, it cannot be restored unless purchased again.
Overworld structures refresh every 20 days.
Nether structures refresh every 10 days.
The End structures refresh every 5 days.
The auto-restock assistive feature can pull items from Shulker Boxes!

plugins.rule_description.rule_agree: I agree to the Terms of Service
plugins.rule_description.rule_agree_agai: I confirm I agree to the Terms of Service
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.1: Play casually and have fun without cheating
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.1.lor:
Common examples:
Using plugins, scripts, building printers, or any unauthorised third-party software to gain an unfair advantage.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.2: Money laundering or multi-accounting is banned
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.2.lor:
Common examples:
Using game mechanics or multiple accounts to engage in large-scale money laundering, or logging in with multiple accounts simultaneously to circumvent restrictions or gain improper benefits.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.3: Minors are present - do not send adult content
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.3.lor:
Common examples:
Sending indecent, obscene, or explicit words, images, or statements in any public channel (including text, signs, name tags, etc.).
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.4: If it's not yours, leave it where it is
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.4.lor:
Common examples:
Stealing items from others' chests, farms, or any containers; destroying, modifying others' or public buildings without permission; maliciously triggering or interfering with others' redstone contraptions.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.5: Look after yourself and don't make others upset
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.5.lor:
Common examples:
Maliciously attacking, harming, or killing other players (except in PvP zones); provoking through item naming, littering, etc.; blocking others' Nether portals, trapping players, or other malicious harassment.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.6: Be respectful, friendly, and inclusive to keep the community clean
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.6.lor:
Common examples:
Spamming, arguing, publicly insulting, or using offensive language in public channels.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.7: If you hate this place, then leave
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.7.lor: We welcome all players who can bring positive influence to the community, and hope to work together to maintain a game environment worth loving.
